domains.name: Identity
domains.tagline: Control who can reach what — and how.

lifecycle.description: Design zero-trust identity architecture, privilege model, and directory structure.
Evaluate standing privilege, MFA gaps, orphaned accounts, and identity sprawl.
Implement IAM controls, MFA enforcement, conditional access, and privilege management.
Define identity operational procedures, alert tuning, and access review cycles.
Reduce excess access, automate provisioning/deprovisioning, improve detection coverage.
Identity Security Assessment, Privileged Access Engineering, Zero Trust Identity Program.

domains.name: Cloud
domains.tagline: Secure the infrastructure your business runs on.

lifecycle.description: Design landing zones, network topology, IAM hierarchy, and data residency controls.
Identify misconfigurations, exposed services, excessive permissions, and compliance gaps.
Implement guardrails, enforce policies, harden configurations, enable logging.
Enable cloud-native monitoring, establish drift detection, define response runbooks.
Reduce attack surface, improve cost and security posture, automate controls.
Cloud Security Assessment, Cloud Landing Zone Engineering, Continuous Cloud Posture.

domains.name: Applications
domains.tagline: Security woven into every layer of your software.

lifecycle.description: Define application security standards, threat model, and SDLC security gates.
Test for OWASP Top 10, authentication flaws, business logic vulnerabilities.
Implement WAF, API security, SAST/DAST tooling, secrets management.
Define vulnerability management workflow and SLA for application findings.
Shift security left, reduce fix cycle time, improve developer security awareness.
Application Security Assessment, AppSec Engineering, Secure SDLC Implementation.

domains.name: Monitoring
domains.tagline: See everything. Respond to what matters.

lifecycle.description: Identify critical data sources, deploy log collection, establish normalized pipeline.
Build detection rules for high-value threats, calibrate to your environment.
Define correlation logic, reduce false positives, build detection coverage metrics.
Build triage runbooks, analyst workflows, and escalation procedures.
Integrate playbooks, automate containment actions, measure response time.
Regular detection reviews, purple team exercises, coverage gap analysis.

domains.name: Network
domains.tagline: Control the paths attackers move through.

lifecycle.description: Design segmentation model, firewall topology, and traffic control strategy including SWG and CASB placement.
Identify flat network zones, exposed services, routing anomalies, lateral paths, and uncontrolled cloud app usage.
Implement Secure Web Gateway to filter and inspect outbound internet traffic — URL filtering, TLS inspection, malware detection, and data loss controls.
Deploy Cloud Access Security Broker for visibility and control over cloud and SaaS app usage. Discover shadow IT, enforce access policy, and prevent data leakage to unsanctioned services.
Implement micro-segmentation, firewall policy hardening, and secure DNS to restrict lateral movement.
Validate firewall rules, routing policies, access control lists, SWG policies, and CASB configurations.
Enable network monitoring, integrate SWG/CASB telemetry into SIEM, define anomaly detection thresholds.
Reduce exposure surface, remove legacy trust paths, tune SWG/CASB policies, automate enforcement.

domains.name: Endpoints
domains.tagline: Harden the devices where your people work.

lifecycle.description: Evaluate patch posture, hardening baselines, detection coverage, unmanaged devices.
Deploy EDR, enforce CIS benchmarks, implement device compliance policies.
Test endpoint controls against real attack techniques, validate detection coverage.
Integrate endpoint telemetry into SIEM, tune alert quality, monitor fleet health.
Reduce unmanaged footprint, improve patch cadence, expand detection rules.
Endpoint Assessment, EDR Engineering, Endpoint Detection Optimization.

domains.name: Data Security
domains.tagline: Classify, control, and continuously protect your most sensitive asset.

lifecycle.description: Identify where sensitive data lives across structured and unstructured stores, cloud and on-prem.
Define data classifications, apply labels, establish handling policies and ownership.

Map how sensitive data moves across systems, processes, and third parties. Identify uncontrolled flows and policy violations. DFAnalyzer automates continuous flow mapping and validates flows against data security policies.
Deploy Data Loss Prevention across endpoint, network, and cloud channels. Calibrate policies to your classification framework. Fine-tune rules to reduce alert noise and improve precision.
Data Security Posture Management — continuous visibility into where sensitive data lives, how it is protected, who can access it, and where posture has drifted from policy.
Identify overprivileged access to sensitive data, reduce exposure surface.
Optimise DLP rules, classification accuracy, and DSPM alerting. Reduce false positives, close coverage gaps, and keep enforcement aligned as data environments change.
Test data controls, confirm encryption coverage, validate DLP rule efficacy.

domains.name: Zero Trust Access
domains.tagline: Replace VPN with per-application, identity-verified private access.

lifecycle.description: Audit existing VPN architecture, access policies, device posture controls, and trust model.
Design per-application access model — application segments, identity policies, device posture requirements — to replace broad-trust VPN.
Implement ZTNA for private application access. Migrate users off legacy VPN without disrupting operations. Enforce least-privilege per application, per session.
Configure continuous device health checks — patch level, MDM enrolment, certificate presence — as conditions for access grant.
Validate access policies, certificate management, split-tunnel configurations, and third-party access scoping.
Define access review cycles, third-party access governance, and session monitoring workflows.
Reduce VPN sprawl, improve session visibility, tighten access scoping over time.
